title: Even and Odd Functions
summary: This page introduces even and odd functions, defining them mathematically by their symmetry properties about the vertical axis. It presents the condition xe(t) = xe(-t) for even functions and xo(t) = -xo(-t) for odd functions, and lists properties governing products of even and odd functions. Graphical examples of each function type are also provided.

figures.caption: Even and odd components of a signal, showing (a) the even part x_e(t) symmetric about the vertical axis and (b) the odd part x_o(t) antisymmetric about the vertical axis.
